name: vit_chrX_cluster
description: Vitellogenin yolk-protein gene cluster on C. elegans chromosome X. Encodes vit-1, vit-2, vit-3, vit-4, vit-5 (yp170 class). The five paralogs are tandemly arrayed and share 60-95% nucleotide identity; vit-3, vit-4, vit-5 form a near-identical sub-block at >95% identity (recent triplication). All five are transcribed in the adult hermaphrodite intestine and dumped into oocytes via receptor-mediated endocytosis. Standard model paralog cluster for read-mapping disambiguation in C. elegans.
expected_copy_count: 5 paralogs (vit-1 through vit-5) in this X cluster
